## Checklist

- [ ] I believe my code is complete and in working condition
- [ ] I've documented my public methods and any other methods I think need to be documented, or have added nothing that needs more documentation
- [ ] I've scanned my code for any left-behind test/debug code
- [ ] I've added/updated automated tests for my code, my code does not need automated tests, or I've been authorized to skip adding tests
- [ ] I've included **(A)** video/gif(s) of my changes, **and/or (B)** a screenshot since my changes only affect one screen, **and/or (C)** it is not possible to post screenshots
- [ ] My changes work in mobile and desktop views, I don't believe they're affected by viewport size, or I've been authorized to skip responsive design
- [ ] I've run `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run build:web` and they pass
- [ ] If this changes functional/logical code, I've bumped the version per `CLAUDE.md`
- [ ] Any new UI uses `theme/` tokens + shared primitives, no ad-hoc styling
- [ ] No secrets committed. Any new env var is documented in `.env.example` (names only)
